nasb.text: That they may keep you from an adulteress, From the foreigner who flatters with her words.

esv.text: to keep you from the forbidden woman, from the adulteress with her smooth words.

cnv.text: 這樣行就可以保護你脫離淫亂的婦人， 脫離說諂媚話的妓女。

ccb.text: 她们能使你远离淫妇， 远离妓女的甜言蜜语。

csbs.text: 这样就能保守你远离淫妇， 远离说谄媚话的淫荡女子。
